# Right triangle setup

## Short Teaching Summary
Right triangle setup: To solve height and distance problems, identify the right triangle formed by the vertical height (opposite side), the horizontal distance (adjacent side), and the line of sight (hypotenuse). Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
